headline: 新片热映，《痴迷》登顶今日热搜
headlineEn: New Films Heat Up, 'Obsession' Tops Today's Trending
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》领跑热搜，《福尔摩斯小姐3》本周强势。多部续集与IP改编作品持续升温。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' leads trending, with 'Enola Holmes 3' strong this week. Sequels and IP adaptations continue to heat up.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》本周热度飙升，续集定档引期待。
industryHighlights.en: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' surges this week, sequel date sparks anticipation.

industryHighlights.text: 《超级少女》新作跻身本周趋势，超级英雄题材持续吸睛。
industryHighlights.en: New 'Supergirl' project enters weekly trends, superhero genre remains hot.

industryHighlights.text: 《权力的游戏前传：龙族》讨论度不减，衍生宇宙再扩张。
industryHighlights.en: 'House of the Dragon' stays trending, expanding the franchise universe.

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》等新作预告上线，影迷热议。
industryHighlights.en: Trailers for 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' and others excite fans.
